seo.title: Tri-County Pest Control | Expert Pest Control in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Tri-County Pest Control offers professional pest control services in Dallas, TX. From ants to rodents, we eliminate pests fast. 4.9 stars. Call now!

hero.headline: Your Home, Pest-Free — Guaranteed
hero.subheadline: Fast, effective, and reliable pest control for Dallas homeowners and businesses. Rated 4.9 stars.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Pest Control for Dallas Homes
featureSections.body: We target pests at the source with eco-friendly treatments that keep your family safe. From ants to rodents, we handle it all.
featureSections.cardBody: Exclusion, trapping, and prevention to keep rodents out for good.

featureSections.title: Our Promise: Fast, Friendly, Effective
featureSections.body: We show up on time, treat your property with respect, and follow up to ensure results. No pests, no stress.
featureSections.cardBody: Eliminate entire colonies with targeted baiting and barrier treatments.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Experts
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas pests and the best ways to treat them.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly
whyChooseUs.description: Low-toxicity treatments safe for kids and pets.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If pests return, we return — at no extra cost.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. Free quotes upfront.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of pest control services tailored to Dallas homes and businesses. Every treatment is backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Ongoing protection against common household pests.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control service targets ants, spiders, roaches, and more with a proven treatment plan that keeps your home pest-free year-round.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect your home to identify pest entry points and activity.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Apply targeted treatments to interior and exterior areas.

process.title: Prevention
process.description: Seal gaps and provide tips to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule pest control?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments for most homes, but monthly plans are available for high-risk areas.

faqs.question: Are your products safe for pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, low-toxicity products that are safe for pets and children when dry.

services.title: Rodent Control
services.shortDescription: Eliminate mice and rats quickly and humanely.
services.longDescription: Rodents can cause serious damage and spread disease. Our exclusion-based approach removes current infestations and prevents future entry.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Identify entry points, nests, and food sources.

process.title: Exclusion
process.description: Seal all gaps and install proofing materials.

process.title: Removal
process.description: Set traps and remove rodents, then monitor for activity.

faqs.question: How long does rodent control take?
faqs.answer: Most infestations are resolved within 1-2 weeks with follow-up visits to ensure complete removal.

faqs.question: Do you offer rodent-proofing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we seal all entry points and install vent covers and door sweeps to keep rodents out.

services.title: Termite Control
services.shortDescription: Protect your home from silent destroyers.
services.longDescription: Termites cause billions in damage annually. Our advanced detection and treatment methods eliminate colonies and protect your property for years.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Thoroughly check for termite activity and damage.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Apply liquid termiticide or install bait stations.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: Regular checks to ensure colony elimination.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have termites?
faqs.answer: Signs include mud tubes, hollow-sounding wood, and discarded wings. We offer free inspections.

faqs.question: Is termite treatment safe for my family?
faqs.answer: Yes, our treatments are low-toxicity and applied with minimal disruption to your daily life.

services.title: Bed Bug Control
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are notoriously difficult to remove. Our heat and chemical treatments penetrate deep into cracks and fabrics to wipe out every stage of the infestation.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Use canine or visual inspection to locate all hiding spots.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Apply heat or chemical treatment to affected areas.

process.title: Verification
process.description: Re-inspect after treatment to confirm elimination.

faqs.question: How many treatments are needed for bed bugs?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-2 treatments, depending on the severity. We provide a follow-up inspection.

faqs.question: Do I need to throw away my furniture?
faqs.answer: No, our treatments can save your furniture. We'll guide you on preparation.

about.headline: Dallas' Trusted Pest Control Since 2008
about.mission: To provide safe, effective, and affordable pest control that gives our neighbors peace of mind.
story: Tri-County Pest Control was founded in 2008 by a team of local pest control experts who saw a need for honest, reliable service in Dallas. What started as a small operation has grown into one of the most trusted pest control companies in the area, serving thousands of homes and businesses.

We believe in treating every home like our own. That means using the safest products, showing up on time, and standing behind our work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Our team continues to train on the latest techniques to stay ahead of Dallas' ever-changing pest challenges.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and charge fair prices.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're your neighbors, and we care about Dallas.

coreValues.title: Accountability
coreValues.description: If it's not right, we make it right.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Call or fill out the form — we'll respond within 24 hours.
